calendar.matters:
Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioner Stephanie R. Saravia, mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through.
Proof of Publication on file.
Order granting mother''s request to change name of minor without further Notice to other parent.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Jullian Alexander Boger to Jullian Alexander Saravia-Boger.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
